Hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable repairs for AC units, wiring, breakers and home appliances — backed by 200+ five-star reviews.

Services.title: What We Repair
Services.intro: From a flickering light to a failed compressor, our technicians fix it all — same-day in most cases.

items.title: AC Repair & Service
items.desc: Cooling problems, gas refill, filter cleaning and full split-unit servicing.

items.title: Breaker & Panel
items.desc: Tripping breakers, burnt panels and safe distribution upgrades.

items.title: Wiring & Rewiring
items.desc: Faulty sockets, short circuits and complete home rewiring.

items.title: Appliance Repair
items.desc: Fridges, washing machines, ovens and water heaters fixed fast.

items.title: Emergency Callouts
items.desc: Power loss and hazardous faults handled the same day.

items.title: Maintenance Plans
items.desc: Scheduled check-ups that prevent breakdowns before they happen.

Why.title: Why Al Qanaa
Why.subtitle: The trusted choice across Al Ain
Why.para: We pair honest pricing, certified technicians and genuine parts to get your home running safely again.
trust: Free diagnostic check on every visit

Process.title: Our Process
Process.subtitle: Four simple steps to get back up and running.

steps.title: Book a Visit
steps.desc: Call or WhatsApp us and we schedule a same-day appointment.

steps.title: Free Diagnosis
steps.desc: Our technician inspects the fault and explains it clearly.

steps.title: Expert Repair
steps.desc: We fix it on the spot using genuine spare parts.

steps.title: Test & Warranty
steps.desc: We verify the work and back it with a service warranty.
